name: Kindergarten Early Learning — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for belonging, routines, play choices, and listening. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with belonging, routines, play choices, and listening.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: belonging, routines, play choices, and listening
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about belonging, routines, play choices, and listening through a close look at belonging, routines, play choices, and listening.

lessons.title: Try it together: belonging, routines, play choices, and listening
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about belonging, routines, play choices, and listening through a guided practice with belonging, routines, play choices, and listening.

lessons.title: Make or show: belonging, routines, play choices, and listening
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about belonging, routines, play choices, and listening through a small creation or demonstration about belonging, routines, play choices, and listening.

units.title: Wonder and notice: belonging, routines, play choices, and listening
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about belonging, routines, play choices, and listening?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about belonging, routines, play choices, and listening.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: belonging, routines, play choices, and listening
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about belonging, routines, play choices, and listening through a close look at belonging, routines, play choices, and listening.

activities.title: A close look at belonging, routines, play choices, and listening
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at belonging, routines, play choices, and listening, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in belonging, routines, play choices, and listening.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
